ability.name: Stellar Slash
ability.desc: Heal HealAP (), then deal DamageAD + DamagePercentArmor () physical damage to the current target.

ability.name: Fish Frenzy
ability.desc: Passive: For every PercentMissingHealth% missing Health, gain AS% () Attack Speed Active: Deal ADDamage () physical damage to the target and TankDamage () if they're a tank.

ability.name: Aim for the Head
ability.desc: Deal BonusDamage + PercentMaximumHealthDamage () magic damage to the lowest Health enemy in range and permanently gain BonusHealthPerCast maximum Health. If this kills them, devour them and permanently gain BonusHealthOnKill maximum Health instead.

ability.name: Temporal Shot
ability.desc: Active: Fire a blast at the current target that deals ADDamage + APDamage () physical damage. Every TakedownsToDrone takedowns, gain a drone that deals DroneDamage () physical damage to the current target on cast.

ability.name: Shield of Daybreak
ability.desc: Gain ShieldAmount () Shield for 4 seconds. Bash the current target, dealing DefenseToDamageRatio () magic damage and stunning them for StunDuration seconds.

ability.name: Dark Matter
ability.desc: Hurl a dagger towards the current target, dealing Damage () magic damage to the first target it hits. After hitting its initial target or at its final destination, the dagger explodes dealing SecondaryDamage () magic damage to nearby targets.

ability.name: Groovin' Susan
ability.desc: Transform for Duration seconds, temporarily gaining MaxHealth max Health and dealing DamageHealth + DamageAP () magic damage to adjacent enemies each second. While transformed, Nasus is in the Groove.

ability.name: Huddle Up!
ability.desc: Gain Shield () Shield for ShieldDuration seconds. For the duration, allies within two hexes gain Resists () Armor and Magic Resistance. Meep Bonus: Meeps grant MeepShield () Shield to the nearest number (Meeps) allies for ShieldDuration seconds.

ability.name: Upheaval
ability.desc: Heal PercentMaximumHealthHealing + APHealing (), then briefly knock up adjacent enemies and deal Damage () magic damage.

ability.name: Diviner's Judgement
ability.desc: Stab the target, causing them to bleed for ADBleedDamage + APBleedDamage () physical damage over BleedDuration seconds. After the attack, leap to the highest percent Health enemy within HexDistance hexes.

ability.name: Double Time
ability.desc: Passive: Attacks deal HitDamage () bonus magic damage and an additional MagicDamage () stacking magic damage over PoisonDuration seconds. While an enemy has GrooveStacks or more stacks, Teemo is in the Groove. Active: Gain AttackSpeed Attack Speed for ActiveAttacks attacks.

ability.name: Fate's Gambit
ability.desc: Draw a card with a value between 1 and 9 by chance, then throw it at the target. Based on the card drawn, deal between DamageMin () and DamageMax () magic damage. Overkill damage bounces to the nearest enemy.

ability.name: Meepteor Shower
ability.desc: Call down a Meepteor on the target that deals Damage () magic damage. Meep Bonus: An additional MiniMeeps (Meeps) mini Meepteor are called down on nearby targets dealing MiniDamage () magic damage each.

ability.name: Star Strike
ability.desc: Reposition next to the target to strike the most enemies. Then throw NumShurikens piercing kunai, each dealing DamageAD + DamageAP () physical damage to the first enemy hit, reduced to SecondaryDamage () for subsequent targets. Kunai remove ArmorShred Armor, increased to ArmorShredCrit if they crit.

ability.name: Tidal Slashes
ability.desc: Unleash a flurry of TotalNumSlashes () slashes at the current target over SlashDuration seconds, dealing ADDamage + APDamage () physical damage each.

ability.name: Slingshot Mane
ability.desc: Passive: Every 5th attack, launch a returning boomerang at the target that travels two hexes past the first enemy it hits. It deals DamageAD + DamageAP () physical damage, reduced by DamageReductionPerHit per hit. Meep Bonus: NumMeeps Meeps attack alongside Gnar, dealing MeepDps () physical damage per second.

ability.name: Chemical Rage
ability.desc: Heal HealingPercentHealth + HEALING () over Duration seconds. Then, deal Damage () magic damage to adjacent enemies and Chill them for CCDuration seconds. Chill: Reduce Attack Speed by 30%

ability.name: Dance n' Dice
ability.desc: Passive: Attacks deal magic damage. Gwen is in the Groove while targeting an enemy below GrooveThreshold Health. Active: Dash to a nearby hex to snip the lowest percent Health enemy, dealing Damage () magic damage to the target and AreaDamage () magic damage to enemies in a cone. If this kills, dash and snip again at ResetDamage damage!

ability.name: Counter Star-ike
ability.desc: Enter a defensive stance for Duration seconds, reducing incoming damage by FlatDR () and gaining ShieldAP () Shield. When the stance ends, strike all nearby enemies, dealing ArmorMRScale + ArmorMRScale () magic damage and Stunning them for StunDuration second(s).

ability.name: Fishbones!
ability.desc: Fire a barrage of NumRockets () bullets in a cone, each dealing TotalDamage () physical damage to the first target hit.

ability.name: Meep Impact
ability.desc: Heal HealingPercentHealth + HealingAP () Health over HealDuration seconds. Slam the target, dealing Damage () magic damage and knocking up for StunDuration seconds. The impact creates meepwaves that deal PercentEffects of these effects in the target's row. Meep Bonus: Meeps water Meepsie's flower, increasing all incoming Healing and Shielding by HealingAndShielding (Meeps) .

ability.name: ULTRA MEGA TIME KICK
ability.desc: Kick a ball at an enemy that deals Damage () magic damage. On impact, the ball has a chance to bounce to a new target dealing BounceDamage () magic damage. These bounces can trigger additional bounces, but the odds halve with each bounce.

ability.name: Indestructible
ability.desc: Gain InitialShield () shield. Each second for the next Duration seconds, gain ShieldPerProc () more shield and deal DamagePerProc () magic damage to adjacent enemies. When this ability ends, consume the remaining Shield and heal for HealRefund of its value.

ability.name: Advanced Defences
ability.desc: Gain APShield () Shield and Durability Durability for Duration seconds. Over the duration, deal TrueDamagePerSecond () physical damage each second to enemies in a cone.

ability.name: Marked for Death
ability.desc: Reposition up to one hex to throw a harpoon at the furthest enemy. The harpoon pulls the first enemy hit one hex forward and deals SpearDamage () physical damage. Then, teleport behind them and cleave, dealing TargetDamage () physical damage to them and AoEDamage () physical damage to nearby enemies.

ability.name: Paddle Star
ability.desc: Fire a paddle star at the current target, dealing Damage () magic damage to the first target hit and SecondaryDamage () to others it passes through. When the missile reaches its destination, redirect it to a distant enemy, increasing its speed and repeating the damage. This redirect can occur NumRedirects times.

ability.name: Hopped-Up Hacks
ability.desc: Open a SpellHexRadius hex rift containing the target, Hacking enemies within for HexDuration seconds and dealing Damage () magic damage to each, plus SplitDamage () magic damage split between all enemies hit. Hacked enemies store HexPercent of all damage they take. When the Hack ends, they take true damage equal to the stored damage. The Hack ends early if it would kill the target.

ability.name: Pale Cascade
ability.desc: Passive: Attacks deal BonusDamageToAttacks () bonus magic damage. Active: Gain Shield () Shield and summon 3 encircling orbs for ShieldDuration seconds. Orbs deal BaseDamage () magic damage to enemies they pass through, and rotate faster based on Attack Speed.

ability.name: Meep Bait
ability.desc: Dash through the current target, dealing DashDamage () magic damage. Every third cast also summons a Mega Meep after a delay, briefly knocking the target up and dealing ChompDamage ( Meeps) magic damage in a one-hex radius, reduced by FalloffPerHex per hex from the center. Meep Bonus: Add NumMeeps (Meeps) Meep to the bait, increasing Mega Meep damage by MeepBonusDamage (Meeps) .

ability.name: Test of Spirit
ability.desc: Gain Shield () Shield for Duration seconds. Over the duration, drain HealthDrain () Health from the nearest NumEnemies enemies. Then slam down, dealing Damage () magic damage to all enemies within 2 hexes.

ability.name: Bullet Cluster
ability.desc: Passive: On takedown, gain ManaPerKill mana. Active: Fire BaseNumMissiles missiles in a HexRange -hex radius around the current target, dealing ADDamage + APDamage () physical damage each.

ability.name: It's Raining Stars
ability.desc: Passive: Lulu's spell gains a different secondary effect each game. Active: Call down something from the sky, dealing Damage () magic damage to NumEnemies nearby enemies and do some special effect based on this game's Stargazer Constellation.

ability.name: Grasp of Convergence
ability.desc: Passive: Gain PassiveRatio more max Health from all sources. Active: Converge an X-shape of vines on the target, dealing Damage () magic damage to each enemy hit and Stunning them for StunDuration seconds.

ability.name: Gun Goddess Arsenal
ability.desc: When you field Miss Fortune, choose between Channeler Mode, Challenger Mode, and Replicator Mode. Miss Fortune has a unique ability based on her mode and gains the associated trait.

ability.name: Disco Inferno
ability.desc: Passive: On combat start, forge a temporary completed item. If 3 items are already equipped, a random completed item becomes Radiant for the rest of combat instead. Active: Gain Shield () Shield for ShieldDuration seconds. Then breath fire in a cone, dealing Damage () magic damage. After any Shield on Ornn expires, Ornn enters the Groove for GrooveDuration seconds.

ability.name: Alien Scythe
ability.desc: Gain Durability Durability for Duration seconds, healing HealAmount () over the duration. Afterwards, slash forward in a line, dealing Damage () physical damage to enemies hit and knocking them up for KnockupDuration second.

ability.name: Jump and Jive
ability.desc: Passive: Whenever an enemy is knocked up, shoot them, dealing PassiveAD + PassiveAP () physical damage and entering the Groove for GrooveDuration seconds. Active: Unleash a volley of bullets at the target, dealing Damage () physical damage and knocking up for StunDuration seconds.

ability.name: Unstoppable
ability.desc: Passive - Proximity Blast: Whenever an enemy enters a ShotgunRange (Range) hex radius, fire a blast in a cone towards the closest adjacent hex that deals ShotgunDamage () physical damage with FalloffPerHex falloff per hex. Each adjacent hex has a ShotgunCooldown second cooldown. Active: Gain ShieldAmount () Shield for ShieldDuration seconds and dash behind the current target. Reset Proximity Blast's cooldowns.

ability.name: Psionic Storm
ability.desc: Channel a one-hex psionic storm that follows enemies for Duration seconds. Each second, it grows larger and deals Damage () magic damage to enemies within, reduced by FalloffPerHex per hex from the epicenter.

ability.name: Deathbeam
ability.desc: Channel a deathbeam in a line towards the current target for Duration seconds. It deals DamagePerSecond () magic damage per second, reduced by DamageReductionPerTarget per enemy it passes through. Deathbeam ignores MagicPen of the enemy's Magic Resist.

ability.name: Asteroid Blaster
ability.desc: Strafe to a nearby position, unleashing BaseMissiles missiles split between the target and all enemies within two hexes. Missiles deal MissileAD + MissileAP () physical damage with a ProcChance% chance of firing a mega missile that deals ProcDamage () instead. Meep Bonus: Every MeepCooldown (Meeps) seconds, launch an Explosive Meep at the target, dealing MeepDamage (Meeps) physical damage in a one hex radius on impact.

ability.name: Gravity Matrix
ability.desc: Enter a defensive stance for DurabilityDuration seconds gaining Durability Durability. While in the defensive stance, attract nearby enemy projectiles and heal Heal () over the duration. When this ends, release a shockwave that deals ARScaling + MRScaling () as physical damage in a HexRange -hex range.

ability.name: Singularity
ability.desc: Gather the force of a black hole, dealing Damage () magic damage split between the target and the NumEnemies closest enemies to them. The target takes an additional SecondaryDamage () magic damage.

ability.name: Cosmic Pursuit
ability.desc: Passive: Attacks and Abilities mark the target. When an enemy reaches MaxMarks marks, Wolf consumes the marks, dealing ADDamage + APDamage () physical damage. Active: Jump up to HexDistance hex away and fire arrows at the nearest NumTargets targets, each dealing SpellDamage () physical damage.

ability.name: Fracture Reality
ability.desc: Passive: Attacks deal BasicAttackDamage () magic damage instead. Active: Summon NumClones clones that attack alongside LeBlanc for NumAttacks attacks, dealing CloneDamageMultiplier damage. For their final attack, clones fire a bolt that deals BoltDamage () magic damage.

ability.name: Psi Strikes
ability.desc: Passive: Every third attack strikes an additional time for PassiveDamage () bonus physical damage. Active: After brief meditation, enter a Psi-State for Duration seconds, gaining Omnivamp Omnivamp, AttackSpeed Attack Speed, and increased movement speed. Twice a second, fire a psychic projection at a random nearby enemy that deals DamageAD + DamageAP () physical damage

ability.name: Bubble Pop
ability.desc: Toss a disco bubble at the target that deals Damage () split between enemies in a one hex radius. The explosion sends NumProjectiles globs towards nearby enemies that deal FirstBounceDamage () magic damage. On cast, Nami enters the Groove for GrooveDuration seconds.

ability.name: Calamity
ability.desc: Gain Shield () Shield for ShieldDuration seconds. Summon an astrolabe to crash down on the most enemies within 2 hexes, dealing InitialDamage () magic damage. Then, Nunu pushes the astrolabe towards the end of the board, dealing FollowupDamage () magic damage. All enemies hit by the astrolabe are knocked up for StunDuration seconds.

ability.name: Gravitational Spin
ability.desc: Gain ShieldAP () shield for ShieldDuration seconds. Then, strike the most enemies in a three hex line, dealing DamageAP + DamageArmor () magic damage. Meep Bonus: Reduce the damage of incoming attacks by FlatDr (Meeps) . After being attacked AttacksPerPassiveTrigger times, deal PassiveDamage ( Meeps) magic damage in a two hex radius.

ability.name: Time Warp
ability.desc: Passive: This Ability adapts to Riven's Attack Damage or Ability Power, whichever is higher. Attacks deal PassiveDamage ( / ) magic/physical damage. Active: Dash to a nearby hex, gaining Shield Shield for ShieldDuration seconds and slashing adjacent enemies for Damage ( / ) magic/physical damage. Every third cast, leap into the air and launch a wave of energy that deals WaveDamage ( / ) magic/physical damage to enemies in a line.

ability.name: Tongue Lash
ability.desc: Passive: Once per combat after dropping below HPThreshold Health, gain Shield for ShieldDuration seconds equal to PercentHealingToShield of healing received this combat. Active: Heal HealAP + HealHP (), then tongue lash all enemies within two hexes dealing DamageAP + DamageHP () magic damage.

ability.name: Stellar Ricochet
ability.desc: Passive: Attacks bounce to strike AttackNumEnemies times, dealing PassivePercentReducedDamage reduced damage per target hit and leaving a Feather behind the final target. Active: Gain AttackSpeed Attack Speed for Duration seconds. At the end, recall all Feathers split between the closest RecallFeatherTargets enemies, dealing ADDamage + APDamage () physical damage each.

ability.name: Ultra Friendly Object
ability.desc: Summon a flying saucer over the current target that lasts Duration seconds. Each second it deals DamagePerSecond () magic damage to the target, plus SplitDamagePerSecond () magic damage split between all enemies within SecondaryHexRange hex. The saucer deals TankDamageIncrease increased damage to Tanks. If an enemy under the UFO dies, Bard has a AbductChance chance to abduct them and create a 1-star copy on your bench. Meep bonus: On combat start, grant the nearest NumAllies (Meeps) Astronauts an additional Meep.

ability.name: Party Crasher
ability.desc: Passive: Every BoltCooldown seconds, call down a bolt on the highest Health nearby enemy that deals BoltDamage () magic damage. Active: Summon a disco ball at the largest clump of enemies, then uppercut the current target dealing UppercutDamage () magic damage and knocking up. They crash down into the disco ball dealing ExplosionDamage () magic damage in a three hex radius. Enter the Groove for GrooveDurationPerTarget second per enemy hit.

ability.name: Perfect Bladework
ability.desc: Passive: Every NumAttacks attacks, reveal a Vital on the target. If a Vital exists, dash to attack it dealing VitalDamage () bonus true damage and heal for PercentHealing of the damage dealt. Active: Reveal NumVitals Vitals on the target and quickly attack them all. If the target dies, remaining Vitals transfer to the nearest enemy. Upon striking the final Vital, create a two hex aura that heals allies within for AuraHealing () over AuraDuration seconds.

ability.name: Collateral Damage
ability.desc: Passive: Attacks fire NumProjectiles projectiles in a cone that deal PassivePercentBAD () physical damage each. Active: Fire an explosive shell that deals Damage () physical damage to the target, and SecondaryDamageAD + SecondaryDamageAP () physical damage to all enemies in a one hex radius.

ability.name: Space Opera
ability.desc: Passive: Jhin has a fixed attack speed of FixedAS and converts every PercentBonusASToConvert of bonus Attack Speed into ADConversionRate bonus Attack Damage. Active: Summon NumHands spectral hands that fire alongside Jhin for the next NumAttacks attacks. Each hand deals ADDamage + APDamage () physical damage per shot and removes ArmorReduction Armor. The final shots deal FinalShotPercentDamageIncrease more damage and pierce through the most enemies in a line, dealing PercentDamageReductionPerTargetHit reduced damage per target hit.

ability.name: Dark Form
ability.desc: Transform into Dark Form for Duration seconds, gaining Shield () Shield for the duration. While in Dark Form, tether the NumEnemies nearest enemies, dealing TetherDamagePerSecond () magic damage per second to each one and healing for OmnivampPercent of damage dealt. At the end of the transfomation, deal FinalDamage () to all tethered enemies.

ability.name: Reality Tear
ability.desc: Passive: On cast, attacks gain BonusDamageOnAttack () stacking bonus magic damage. Starting from the third cast, gain true damage instead. Active: Gain ShieldAP + ShieldHP () Shield for ShieldDuration seconds, then slice open a rift on the largest group of champions dealing the Passive's bonus damage to all enemies within. Enemies have their Attack Speed slowed by ASSlow while allies within gain BonusAS Attack Speed, both rapidly decaying over BuffDebuffDuration seconds.

ability.name: Psionic Crush
ability.desc: Hurl a chunk of magnetic debris at the nearest target without one, dealing DebrisDamage () magic damage and sticking it to them. If an enemy with debris dies, it passes to the nearest enemy without one. Every NumCasts casts, instead rip off all debris dealing DebrisRipDamage () magic damage, then crush all the debris onto the target, dealing SlamDamage () magic damage and briefly stunning them.

ability.name: Lend Me a Hand
ability.desc: Passive: Every time Vex attacks, Shadow strikes a nearby enemy, dealing ShadowHandDamage () magic damage. Whenever an enemy is struck NumStrikesForPassive times by Shadow, Shadow strikes them again. Active: Shadow launches NumActiveStrikes empowered strikes, dealing ShadowHandMagicDamage () magic damage instead.

ability.name: Quantum Clone
ability.desc: Create a clone behind the target with HPPenalty reduced max Health and ManaCostIncrease increased Mana cost. The clone inherits its creator's items, stats, and current Health, and can cast Quantum Clone.
